verdict_reasoning: TMED9 is a p24-family protein resident in ER/ERGIC/cis-Golgi, involved in anterograde and retrograde intra-secretory-pathway transport. Its single-pass TM domain places N- and C-termini in the luminal face of compartments upstream of the trans-Golgi. No documented PM pool, no cell-state-induced ectodisplay, no narrow-cell-type surface restriction, not a lysosomal protein, no documented PM cycling, and no stable surface-partner tethering. No cell-surface-directed therapeutic programs target this protein.
